info.title: Flipdish API - Menus
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Menus operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

403.description: Successful authentication, but authorization has been denied for this request.

get.description: Get Menu Zone via the Flipdish Open API v1.0 (GET /api/v1.0/menus/{menuId}/zones/{menuZoneId}).

401.description: Authentication has been denied for this request.

403.description: Successful authentication, but authorization has been denied for this request.

put.description: Set Menu Zone Name via the Flipdish Open API v1.0 (PUT /api/v1.0/menus/{menuId}/zones/{menuZoneId}/name/{menuZoneName}).

Name.description: Name of Menu, only shown in portal

DisplaySectionLinks.description: Display menu section link on UI

IsIntegrated.description: Flag to indicate if the menu is integrated (contains metadata)

IsMasterOptionSet.description: Is master option set. This can affect the layout of the options in the menu displayed to the customer. Usually it is true if the option could be considerd a standalone item as opposed to an addition ("with ketchup") or modifier ("large").

DisplayOrder.description: Display order. Displayed in ascending order.

MaxSelectCount.description: Maximum number of items can be selected

CellLayoutType.description:
Small | Medium | Large
Affects the layout of the menu.

MenuItemOptionSetItemId.description: Menu item option set item identifier

NextMenuItemOptionSetId.description: if null, next option set is next. if -1, this is the final option set

Range.description:
A class that represents a single opening period in a day.
This starts 'StartTime' after midnight and runs for a 'Period'
after that, on the given DayOfWeek.
